name: gently
description: AI-powered coding assistant — Bring Your Own Key via OpenRouter

gently.temperature.description: Temperature for AI responses (0.0 = deterministic, 2.0 = creative)

gently.monolithPolicy.description: How to handle monolithic file writes with large inline blocks (warn = suggest split, block = reject and require modular split).

gently.maxInlineLines.description: Maximum inline style/script lines tolerated before monolith warnings/blocking.

gently.growthLineThreshold.description: Line threshold that triggers modularization hints for file growth.

gently.agentMode.description: Enable autonomous agent mode with tool access

gently.selectedModel.description: OpenRouter model slug (e.g. deepseek/deepseek-chat, anthropic/claude-3.5-sonnet, openai/gpt-4o)

gently.promptPipeline.enabled.description: Enable the modular PromptBuilder pipeline. Falls back to legacy prompts on build errors.

gently.promptPipeline.variant.description: Prompt variant used by the modular prompt pipeline.

gently.promptPipeline.promptId.description: Optional prompt registry id override (e.g. architect-core, code-core) for rollback/testing.

gently.promptPipeline.familyOverrides.description: Enable model-family specific prompt optimizations with safe fallback to base prompts.

gently.pruning.strategy.description: Conversation pruning strategy (hybrid = fast local pruning, legacy = LLM summarization fallback).

gently.pruning.maxHistoryLength.description: Maximum conversation messages kept before pruning in hybrid mode.

gently.pruning.maxToolOutputChars.description: Maximum characters kept for pruned tool outputs in hybrid mode.

gently.pruning.protectedTurns.description: Number of most recent user turns protected from tool-output pruning.

gently.performance.memoryBankCacheTtlMs.description: TTL in milliseconds for caching formatted memory-bank prompt context.

gently.performance.legacyPruneCooldownMs.description: Minimum newly added messages before another legacy LLM summary is allowed.

gently.performance.adaptivePromptVariant.description: Enable adaptive downshift to minimal prompt variant under context pressure.

gently.performance.adaptiveVariantUsageT.description: Usage percentage threshold to force minimal prompt variant.

gently.performance.adaptiveVariantNoTool.description: Number of recent turns used when checking for zero tool-call activity.

gently.performance.adaptiveVariantMinCon.description: Minimum conversation length before no-tool adaptive minimal variant can trigger.

gently.retrieval.rerankerEnabled.description: Enable cross-encoder reranking in hybrid retrieval (disable for lower latency).

gently.modelPolicies.skipReasoningForInc.description: Skip streaming reasoning content for models with known low-signal or noisy reasoning output.

gently.modelPolicies.providerCaching.ena.description: Enable provider-specific cache hints for selected prompt messages.

gently.modelPolicies.geminiSchemaSanitiz.description: Sanitize JSON schemas for Gemini compatibility before sending tool definitions.

gently.modelPolicies.reasoningEffort.description: Preferred reasoning effort level for model families that support reasoning controls.

gently.modelPolicies.webpFallback.enable.description: Prepare WebP fallback policy hook (active when image payload support is enabled).

gently.resilience.strictResponseGuards.description: Enable strict response guards to fail fast on empty assistant responses and invalid output budgets.

gently.resilience.contextRecoveryV2.description: Enable deterministic context-length recovery (aggressive recompress, tool-output prune, then max-token reduction).

gently.resilience.killSwitch.description: Disable new resilience guards and fall back to the legacy request/retry behavior.

gently.resilience.errorContractV1.description: Enable structured resilience status events for deterministic UI and diagnostics.

gently.resilience.retryOrchestratorV1.description: Enable deterministic retry orchestration with fixed error-priority order.

gently.resilience.telemetryV1.description: Emit structured resilience telemetry events with stable codes and flow IDs.

gently.resilience.circuit.failureThresho.description: Failure count before a circuit breaker opens.

gently.resilience.circuit.cooldownMs.description: Cooldown in milliseconds before attempting HALF_OPEN execution.

gently.resilience.circuit.halfOpenMaxTri.description: How many trial executions are allowed while a circuit is HALF_OPEN.

gently.resilience.circuit.perToolEnabled.description: Enable per-tool circuit breakers for selected critical tools.

gently.resilience.circuit.perToolTargets.description: Tool names that should use isolated per-tool circuit breakers when perToolEnabled is true.

gently.hooks.timeoutMs.description: Maximum hook execution time in milliseconds before timeout.

gently.hooks.maxMemoryMB.description: Maximum allowed additional memory usage for hook execution in MB.

gently.hooks.catchErrors.description: Catch hook errors and continue core execution flow.

gently.hooks.logFailures.description: Log hook failures as structured warning events.

scripts.build: npm run build:extension && npm run build:webview
scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
scripts.test:unit: vitest run src/agent/tools/ToolRegistry.test.ts src/commands/CommandRegistry.test.ts src/modes/tests/ModeManager.test.ts src/modes/tests/ModeToolConsistency.test.ts src/performance/cache.test.ts src/performance/performanceOptimizer.test.ts src/performance/sessionManagerIntegration.test.ts src/plugins/tests/PluginManager.test.ts src/session/SessionManager.test.ts src/terminal/TerminalManagerRefactored.test.ts src/utils/constants.test.ts src/utils/errorHandler.test.ts

author: Gently Team
